entry.title: Re: FM READ_TEXT is not showing the data but the SAP standard transaction ME33L does show all the da
entry.content:
• If youd didn't change the default text during creation, the displayed text will be the text of the material master data.
  • When an user change the text, this text will become adopted by the purchase document and copied with the expected keys.

In Customizing you can force adoption (e.g. Define text types for item texts)

Also browse tables T165K (header) and T165P (item) to get the copy rules (from which text to which text) so if a text is not adopted at current level, read it from previous level (material, inforecord, etc.)

VORGATDOBJECTTDIDFOLGEBSTYPKOOBJECTKOIDFIXIE
LEKPOL030 EKPOL03 
LEKPOL031 MATERIALGRUNN

Note the FIXIE = N, so text from material master data is by default not adopted by document item.

entry.title: MATMAS inbound idoc fails with "Enter an industry sector" in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
MATMAS inbound idoc fails with "Enter an industry sector" in S/4HANA Cloud but this field is not available in the classical Create Material app or Manage Product Master Data 

 

Is there a Configuration activity to maintain this or what should i maintain in the Idoc ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: MATMAS inbound idoc fails with "Enter an industry sec...
entry.content:
The customizing 'Define Industry Sectors and Industry-Sector-Specific Field Selection' is not available in S/4HANA Cloud as a configuration activity 

The default Industry Sectors is 'M' Mechanical engineering

In the inbound Idoc , please maintain M for MBRSH in E1MARAM

entry.title: Migrating SAP office e-Mails from SAP CRM to S/4HANA
entry.content:
We plan to shut down our SAP CRM system. Is there a way to migrate all e-mails  (incoming and outgoing mails one can see in transaction SCOT) from the SAP CRM system to the S/4HANA system? 

Thanks in advance for any helpful advice. 

 

PS:

I have already analyzed report RSBCS_RESTORE but it seems only to work if the source system is a copy of the target system.

entry.title: Re: I want to consult the difference between ODATA and SO...
entry.content:
This is an old post but it comes up on top of Google search when looking for "SOAP vs OData" in SAP domain. (I'm guessing because someone edited the post in 2024.)

Because of that, I'd like to add some corrections / clarifications to the answer that is currently listed as "Accepted".

1) It talks about "web services" as if it only applies to SOAP. But both SOAP and REST (which OData uses) are in general web services (see Wikipedia).

2) Both OData and SOAP rely on HTTP protocol (what doesn't these days? 🙂 ). SOAP can technically use SMTP but I've never seen an implementation like that in SAP space.

3) Historically, SOAP web services became available in SAP systems first. They were generated from the ABAP function modules and maintained in SOAMANAGER transaction. (Note that there is also SOA = Service-oriented architecture, this is not the same SOA as in SOAP, fun stuff.)

4) Even though SOAP services can still be used and developed, they went out of favor generally (not just in SAP) because REST-based OData services are less "bulky" and gained more adoption in IT outside of SAP. Also, latest ABAP programming model (ABAP RAP / ABAP Cloud) is focused on OData service development. Therefore this is usually the first (but not the only) choice for SAP integration.

Bottom line, it's not as simple as "SOAP = old = bad, OData = good" but in general, SOAP services are used much less these days.

SOAP, REST, and OData are not SAP terms. I'd encourage to read the general information about these (e.g. wiki articles linked here) to become familiar with terminology in general.

Cheers!

entry.content:
Dear Friends

SF field nationalID is mapped to PERID in SAP

but when we remove Tax number and try replicating, its successful, but Client wants to maintain both Tax number and CURP national ID.

 

Is there a way we can maintain both in SF and replicate successfully.

 

Please help

entry.title: Re: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SA...
entry.content: I suspect you want to use "Composition of many Machines" instead of one since I plant would typically have zero, one or more machines.  Using of one restricts there to only being one machine ever at the plant and use of one is discouraged per the compositions CDL doc.  Please verify your use case and update accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Error connecting to system using ADT on eclipse
entry.content:
I have faced this :
Here is a check list
1) SAP Gateway service was not connected --> Was able to get hold of the problem, with that
Double-check that the SAP gateway service is running on the server. You can do this by checking the SAP Management Console or using transaction SMGW in the SAP GUI
2) Check your route configuration
3) ADT version is outdated

The reason can be many

entry.title: Re: How to delete a service organization in public cloud...
entry.content:
Hi Kevin,

If the Service Org has been activated (i.e., deployed to the Dev tenant), you cannot delete it. However, you can control not to transport this org info to Test and Production tenants.

I have an explanation on a similar question: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/experience-with-deleting-company-codes-before-go-live/qaq-p/13803676/comment-id/4842899#M4842899.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Locating the fields "Last Changed On" and "Completed on… - Approval date" in SAP Sales CDS view.
entry.content:
To create a custom report, we need to locate 2 specific fields from the CDS view tables from Sales apps. 

The fields requested are Last Changed On and Completed on… - Approval date, both fields are available in the My Outbox app, however I can't seem to find the correct view which contains these 2 fields.




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Locating the fields "Last Changed On" and "Completed...
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

One of the fields requested (Last Changed On) can be located in the I_SalesDocument CDS View, you can confirm this by accessing the SAP API Portal and searching for LastChangeDate.

 

The other field requested "Completed on… - Approval date" is more complex, this information is located in the WorkflowTask tables and you can find further details in the I_WorkflowStatusDetails CDS view, the field name is WrkflwTskCompletionUTCDateTime, both of them can be located in the API Portal link above.

 

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: S/4 Product Compliance - Label Management
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I am currently exploring the new S/4HANA Product compliance solution as a possible fit for my client's requirements. Note we are implementing S/4HANA 2023, so please keep this in mind.

Specifically, I am looking at the new Product Compliance Label management solution, and want to get a better understanding of how it works. I have gone through in much detail the resources on help.sap.com which explains the concept very well. i.e. I understand that it relies on a third party partner to design and print the labels. 

So far, after reviewing the material and resources, the process as I understand it is as follows: 

1. create compliance requirement for labels

2. design label template using external partner solution (this replaces the old classic WWI approach). send template back to S/4 product compliance

3. assign compliance requirement and the label template to a label category in the label configuration app

4. assign configured label category to the product

5. validate and request print the label (using external partner) as and when needed.

Questions 🙂 

1. I reviewed the details of the label-specific compliance requirement that needs to be created, however, it does not seem to have much information in it other than the date format. I am just a bit unclear about how to assign the phrases and regulatory graphics to the compliance requirement. Do we create our own compliance requirement with these specific phrases and graphics?

2. Is the process similar to the safety data sheet process where we perform an assessment against the assigned compliance requirements that contain phrases and labels? 

3. For my benefit, would it be possible to briefly describe the end-to-end process from design of template all the way to print from a business process point of view?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: XSLT code to delete node based on one field in the it...
entry.content:
Thanks, it works now.

 

<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes"/>
<xsl:template match="item[TRANSTYPECODE = '']"/>
<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Formatted Search Help
entry.content:
Hi,
I am having a problem with a formatted search in SAP B1 Hana

Table OPOR, I have a UDF    TRX_Expired
Table POR1, I have a UDF     TRX_Expired
I need a formatted search in OPOR to populate TRX_Expired with "Item Expired" if any lines in POR1 TRX_Expired = "Item Expired"

Example 1
     OPOR
     DocNum       TRX_Expired
     1234             Item Expired  (1 item in POR1 has the wording Item Expired)
     POR1
     DocNum        Item Code   TRX_Expired
     1234              ABC1            (Empty)
     1234              ABC2            Item Expired

Example 2
     OPOR
     DocNum       TRX_Expired
     1234             (empty)
     POR1
     DocNum        Item Code   TRX_Expired
     1234              ABC1           (Empty)
     1234              ABC2           (Empty)

It seems straight forward, but I am getting weird errors
Any help will be appreciated.

entry.title: Send emails dynamically in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Good afternoon!

Currently I am working on sending emails to multiple recipients using an XML payload defined as follows:

<EmpRecords>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>123</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Gopi</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>K</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>30000 </EmpSalary>
           <email>test1@mail.com</email>
     </EmpRecord>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>456</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Ram</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>C</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>30000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test2@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>789</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Mohammad</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>Khan</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>40000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test3@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
      <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>234</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Varnikai</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>L</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
            <EmpSalary>40000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test4@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
</EmpRecords>

The test emails are:

test1@mail.com

test2@mail.com

test3@mail.com

test4@mail.com

However, I have not found a way to put the 4 emails coming from the payload into the email connector definition.

 

Is there a method to dynamically place emails that come from an XML Payload?

Thanks

Regards

entry.title: How to enable the footers and use it in Master Form?
entry.content:
Customer wants to enable Footer2-Footer8 in a Master Form for Purchase Order. How to do it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to enable the footers and use it in Master Form?
entry.content: To understand how it works the Footer enablement please follow this blog: S/4HANA Cloud Output Management – Customize Master Form for Logo and Texts (Footer Blocks)

entry.title: How to get SAP GUI bit version through ABAP code?
entry.content:
Looking for a way how to get through ABAP code a version (32/64bit) of SAP GUI from user. Is there is a way via class CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES somehow?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to get SAP GUI bit version through ABAP code?
entry.content:
There's no method for this.

An idea would be checking if registry node HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\SAPGUI64 and the values underneath it exist.

This only exists if a SAP GUI 64bit has been installed.

entry.title: Re: SQLITE_ERROR: no such table: localized_AdminService_Authors
entry.content:
Hi I know this is an old post but I am currently doing this same training project and I have the same issue. I'm surprised there isn't a more definitive solution 4 years later but I got it to work.

I have had this problem before on other frameworks and the problem lies in the package-lock.json file. Delete that file, do an 'npm install' and redeploy with 'cds deploy'. That should refresh the package-lock file and update it and work.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP project with persistent database: Error - missing localized_* tables
entry.content: Hi I know this is an old post but I am currently doing this same training project and I have the same issue. I'm surprised there isn't a more definitive solution 4 years later but I got it to work. I have had this problem before on other frameworks and the problem lies in the package-lock.json file. Delete that file, do an 'npm install' and redeploy with 'cds deploy'. That should refresh the package-lock file and update all the settings and work.

entry.title: Re: How to Connect CAPM With Integration Suite ?
entry.content: EDMX files can only be created for OData services. You could create a OpenAPI specification or just directly consume the API. I would suggest you do some further research: https://cse.google.com/cse?cx=013447253335410278659:k8ob9ipscwg&q=cap+rest+consume

KR, Wouter

Hello all!

I am building an external site for our contractors and want to change the background for the site to be more customized color and/or image. Where would I change this at?

Enter a valid proposed strategy.

Good day MohamedMedhat1599,

Welcome to the SAP SIgnavio Community and thank you for sharing your inquiry!  I have provided the link below to explore the SAP Signavio Process Management training at SAP Learning.  I hope this will be helpful, and much success to you in taking the training.

 

SAP Signavio Process Management

Kind regards,

Kantrice D.

entry.title: Re: Rework Processing - Stock-Manufactured Material (BJN)...
entry.content:
Hi Georg,

You could manually assign the returned serial number(s) when creating the rework order via Menu > Header > Serial Numbers... Then you can post the consumption of returned FG126 with serial number and again the goods receipt with the same serial number as it is transferred from production order to goods receipt app. 

The rework processing can then be shown in the "Serial Number History" app - I skipped delivery to and return from customer - flow starting on the right with initial production order: 

If you don't need to record the serial number during rework processing in the ERP system you could think of an alternative process using a production order without consumption of the returned material or goods receipt (app "Production Order without Material - Create"). Here, you add only other materials which are required for rework processing in the production order component list but not the returned material. 

Kind regards
Franziska

entry.title: Re: CAP Deployment - FIORI App Does not Appear under the...
entry.content: Please check out the example https://github.com/SAP-samples/multi-cloud-html5-apps-samples/tree/main/managed-html5-runtime-fiori-launchpad-mta. Your mta is missing "sap.cloud.service" which must correspond to sap.cloud.service in the manifest.json.

entry.title: Re: Enter a valid proposed strategy.
entry.content: For PPDS the strategies to be maintained in SIMG - Advanced Planning - Specify Requirements Strategies

entry.title: Re: Enter a valid proposed strategy.
entry.content: For PPDS the strategies to be maintained in SIMG - Advanced Planning - Specify Requirements Strategies

entry.title: Re: Public cloud - embedded EWM - automatic synchronous g...
entry.content:
Hi Jens, 

Your observation is correct. This feature is not supported.

Kind regards 
Franziska

entry.title: Re: Sign in with an Email link - New feature for SAP Concur login
entry.content: Hi @Das_Dipto are you sure your profile have your own email from the field "email" because, not always the email filed in the "email field" (from your personal profile) is the same email you fill to login the system. Check it out.

entry.title: Re: SCORM file expiration
entry.content:
Hi Cris,

There's nothing built in that would make a content object expire as in making it automatically inactive or something of the like. There are content vendors that keep track of licenses and which users are using which content and can stop that content from working but that is not something that SF LMS manages or can report on.

entry.title: Re: Inactivate Ext Users are being assigned to a Course
entry.content: Hi Sally, manual deactivation does not clear the learning plan/assignments from the users so any changes to items, content, etc. will impact any users that has those assigned. When a user is made active but also assigned something, there is no job that would then check for delta changes since they were made inactive. Technically that is why if something is assigned via assignment profile and they are made inactive, the assignment profile will no longer associate them to the rules and that will reassign once they are active again if the assignment profile is still active.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere to Power BI via an ODBC Connection
entry.content: @Gem_Regan I have tried this approach and was able get the data into PBI but here's a question - Is there a way to be able to use the Input Parameters to limit the data that is read? I am looking to limit the data volume as we need to read about 15-20M records every morning and this process takes anywhere aroung 35-40 min. Alternately, what could be done to speed up the process?
